summary: Defined change map, API contract, and Prisma migration plan for autocomplete activation, custom multi-waypoint routes, cupos manual input, and draft events. All EventState changes are additive; non-exhaustive switch breakage flagged as the top risk.

decisionsResolved.draftFindOneAuthGuard: New RPC pattern findOneEventForViewer({id, authUserId}) used only by gateway GET :id; existing findOneEvent (id-only) untouched so tracking/registrations/cron callers do not break. Non-owner draft -> 404 (does not leak existence).
decisionsResolved.publishEndpointAuth: Gateway resolves ownerId via existing getAuthenticatedUser (email -> findUserByEmail -> user.id), same as findMyEvents.
decisionsResolved.createDraftApproach: No separate createDraft endpoint; client sends state:'DRAFT' on POST /events. CreateEventDto.state already optional with SCHEDULED default.
decisionsResolved.waypointsStorage: String[] column on Event with @default([]); no separate Waypoint table.
decisionsResolved.migrationStrategy: Single hand-authored migration: ALTER TYPE ADD VALUE + ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN (column does not reference the new enum value, so one file is transactionally safe).
decisionsResolved.routeMapPreviewWaypoints: Recommended: show waypoint markers (no polyline) on RouteMapPreview - DESIGN to confirm.
decisionsResolved.myDraftsPlacement: Recommended: entry point on the profile page - DESIGN to confirm.

newEndpoint.response: full Event object with state SCHEDULED

modifiedEndpoint.change: switches RPC to findOneEventForViewer({id, authUserId}); non-owner draft -> 404

topRisks: Adding EventState.draft breaks exhaustive switches in event_dto_converters.dart, event_card.dart, event_detail_view.dart, event_detail_owner_lifecycle_bar.dart - must patch all in the same change set.
saveDraft must bypass full form validation - requires a separate buildDraftToSave path filling safe defaults for required EventModel fields.
Autocomplete rewrite must keep the FormBuilderField<String> contract so RouteMapPreview keeps reading form values; debounce timer + overlay must be disposed.
nextPhase: design + backend (parallel); frontend blocked on both
